name: Devin

form_factor.comment: Web app + VS Code extension + CLI + Slack/Teams + REST API and official devin-sdk (Python). CLI installs the `devin` binary via Devin Desktop or the standalone CLI installer/Homebrew cask. Per-form-factor links: Extension: https://docs.devin.ai/work-with-devin/ide-extensions; CLI: https://docs.devin.ai/cli; Web: https://app.devin.ai/; SDK: https://docs.devin.ai/api-reference/overview.

released_in.comment: First publicly demoed March 2024. Made Generally Available (GA) on December 10, 2024.

latest_major_update.comment: Devin 2.2 (Feb 24, 2026): 3x faster startup, end-to-end desktop testing, Devin Review Autofix, redesigned UI. Continuous weekly releases since.

rules.comment: AGENTS.md files in repos, Knowledge (persistent org-level instructions with trigger descriptions), Skills & Rules settings. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

skills.comment: Full Agent Skills standard support. SKILL.md files in .agents/skills/. Supports YAML frontmatter, dynamic $ARGUMENTS and !command blocks. Also Playbooks system. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

hooks.comment: Automations engine: Slack/GitHub/Linear/schedule/cron/webhook triggers. Actions include start session, message session, triage. Payload filtering and secret auth.

mcp_servers.comment: MCP Marketplace with 40+ pre-built integrations. Supports STDIO, SSE, and HTTP transports. Custom MCP server tools for session/playbook/knowledge management. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

custom_commands.comment: Built-in slash commands (/plan, /review, /test, /think-hard, /implement) plus org-level custom slash commands. Also @skills:name syntax and macros. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

goal_command.comment: Devin supports team custom slash commands; no documented `/goal` for persistent thread-level objectives with auto-continuation.

subagents.comment: Yes, called 'Managed Devins'. Coordinator spawns child Devin sessions in isolated VMs for parallel work. Auto-triage also spawns sub-devins.

model_selection.comment: Not explicitly user-facing. Devin offers 'Fast Mode' (~2x faster at 4x ACU). No documentation about letting users choose the underlying LLM model.

approval_mode.comment: 'Secure Mode' (disables native deployment, restricts outbound access). ACU caps, RBAC, PR review approval. No granular approval per action.

sandbox_mode.comment: Full isolation. Every session gets a fresh ephemeral snapshot. Enterprise VPC deployment option. VPN configuration supported.

resume.comment: API auto-resumes suspended sessions. CLI /resume alias. PR Resuming feature (Apr 2026). Archive/unarchive with undo.

continue.comment: CLI /handoff transfers to cloud Devin with full context (git branch + conversation history). API session messaging for continuation.

non_interactive.comment: Full headless/API mode. REST API with service user auth. Automations run fully autonomously (CI fixers, scheduled sessions, auto-triage).

output_format.comment: API returns structured JSON. Sessions support structured output schemas. No documented machine-readable mode for the CLI itself.

statusline.comment: No statusline feature found in any documentation. Web app shows session status indicators but no CLI statusline.

telemetry.comment: No user-configurable telemetry setting found in documentation. Enterprise audit logs available. Privacy controls mentioned but no opt-in/opt-out toggle.

custom_model_provider.comment: Cerebras mentioned as enterprise-ready inference provider. No self-serve BYO model option documented.

notes: Devin pioneered the autonomous AI software engineer category. Focuses on enterprise: VM isolation, managed sub-agents, automations. Higher-end pricing reflects the hosted, managed approach. Windsurf acquisition announced April 2026.

pricing.comment: Free (limited), Pro ($20/mo), Max ($200/mo), Teams ($80/mo minimum). Enterprise: custom pricing with VPC, SAML/OIDC. ACU-based consumption model.

hosted_agent.comment: Primarily cloud-hosted at app.devin.ai; Devin CLI bridges to cloud agent.

transcripts.comment: Location: hosted/web/API-managed session history; no local transcript directory documented.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Research needed. Check official documentation for keybinding customization options.

theme_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for theme/appearance customization options.

auto_save.comment: Research needed. Check for auto-save or session persistence features.

debugging_output.comment: Research needed. Check for debug mode or verbose logging options.

context_window.comment: Research needed. Check for configurable context length or token limits.

code_formatting.comment: Research needed. Check for formatter/linter integration or auto-format options.

git_integration.comment: Research needed. Check for git command support or version control integration.

performance_mode.comment: Research needed. Check for caching, optimization, or resource management settings.

ui_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for UI layout, sidebar, or panel customization.
